title: Tile Calculator - Square Feet & Tiles Needed
description: Free tile calculator. Calculate how many tiles you need for floors or walls based on area size and tile dimensions. Includes waste factor.
keywords: tile calculator square feet, how many tiles do I need, tile area calculator, flooring calculator, tile coverage
intro: Calculate how many tiles you need for your project. Enter room dimensions and tile size to get the total tiles required including waste allowance.

faq.q: How do I calculate tiles needed?
faq.a: Divide the total area (sq ft) by the area of one tile (sq ft). Add 10-15% for cuts and waste.

faq.q: How much extra tile should I buy?
faq.a: Buy 10% extra for simple layouts, 15% for diagonal patterns, and 20% for complex patterns or rooms with many cuts.

faq.q: How do I calculate square footage?
faq.a: Multiply length × width in feet. For irregular rooms, divide into rectangles, calculate each, and add them together.
